Authors Notes—

♡ Last part of the series in Dazai’s POV. Finale coming soon with a surprise character...take your guess! I kinda made this last one on a whim with no extra planning so sorry about that, try surviving lmao ♡

YAP ZONE—

Yoo this entire month has been insane and Christmas was crazy—fun but some drama with friends, anyway this is kinda half-assed but I didn’t want to make an entire thing for Benji (I think that was Becks bf??) and Peach because...ugh. Sorry, but the next one will have a surprise guest. Dead dove because who knows what Dazai will do now lmao
